sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88149" key="prooiki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προοικ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88149.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the projecting eaves of a house,</tr_> Clitodem.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0060.tlg001.perseus-grc3:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
